svg.title: Synalux POS — scale
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for scale. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Unit types supported: lb · oz · kg · g — price stored in
price_per_unit_cents; computed at ring-up: weight × unit_price
Weight captured automatically when item scanned (PLU mode).
Auto-lock on stable weight for 3 consecutive reads
